exclusion_policy: exclude author/local-machine identifiers from text files
exclude manuscripts unless explicitly part of reproducibility artifacts
exclude caches, bytecode, notebook checkpoints, LaTeX build files, archives, hidden metadata, and broad exploratory outputs
preserve binary figure/table artifacts byte-for-byte where copied from final outputs
